transaction.comments: Need to include Clark in order to make the salary cap work.
I believe this would fit under the salary cap.
Hi are you interested in a good back up Starting QB?   I'm looking to rebuild with draft picks.  Let me know if see anything you like.
To cuff w/ Pierre for when Ingram goes down?  If that deal is not to your liking let me know if there's anything else within reason that would get er done.
Still interested in Bradshaw.  See what you think of this.

I'm interested in Foster. 1.02 player locked up for, I'm assuming 5 years, is probably equal to if not greater in value than Foster for 1 year. Let me know, not really willing to give up more as I'd rather lock up Ingram, Green, or Julio cheaply for 5 years than pay more than this.
